Challenge Name: Public Broadcasting

Intended Category: Crypto

Credit To: Daniel Moreno

Description: 
Some broadcast station in Pace is sending messages to points in Navarre, Milton, Pensacola, Ferry Pass, Fort Walton, and Summerdale. It's not too difficult to pick up the individual transmissions, and each receiver's website has the information neccessary to send them private messages. Can you figure out what is being sent?

(7, 8630018040679780396508245838560739147155342479855809270263559474070113910682314651902734906119071427005509586344275673690400539682418956221706192623660931)
6473645272310440245286704840159529700438649488833465951698013343719047276643286463910832319010410060381961915964951830823005392797248927390284228996667196

(7, 5432603603738574942357420987083715099758528360443943132361536318457235905056819351445006660666892813188805089428302940118026959592059935191331647680599977)

(3, 6520964845308950373197438893440514355952949434850834595873530232211324125182254804883971430597915265416106287182273287539570976315001947125524586403162113)

(3, 7404681201114276001051656895798510381650513444419151052497370503612423587663851113991174436270378200859949187993821945478143533376621778658336785136596033)

(7, 5848705219437764928388024320163261282006038235941130994818160934482597421726692152993741234848605555257228030209683861061483923283721696104845593418053201)
5617863043171130163370885763154253910126758152530345866471112319703045128418618432611338198257049431952550175773415871755743700329445733599677176032044559

(5, 9152028653628784032938636793332730789287637850149185113936828245205566906437566217248971759827126131626154312322659837121062344727869577661057184806017897)
2126214774849645939506089365804145674725903952858545544761550297370618413517559870778562401689391382542972780040376374877142408376181026385851927732280168

Hints:
* This is really repetitive RSA encryption

Solution:
1. Realize that a crypto challenge involving big numbers normally is normally a RSA challenge
2. Realize that 3 receivers use the same, small value for e. When combined with the mentions of a broadcast station, this is Hastad’s Broadcast Attack
3. Plug the provided c and n values into a tool like [this](https://github.com/rahiel/id0-rsa.pub/blob/master/11-H%C3%A5stad%27s-broadcast-attack.py) or [this](https://github.com/ashutosh1206/Crypton/blob/master/RSA-encryption/Attack-Hastad-Broadcast/hastad_unpadded.py)
4. Get the flag

Flag: `PCA{h4st4d_d1d_7h3m_1n}`
